## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss feedback on article pipeline and prioritize improvements to production workflow](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current AI article generation process is time-consuming and produces verbose, disjointed content compared to using Claude directly](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Need to streamline workflow steps, improve prompt engineering, and enhance AI editor capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Focus on making content creation process more enjoyable for writers while automating tedious tasks](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Plan to review and update core prompts for outlining, brief generation, and article generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Current Pain Points with Article Generation

  - [Length/verbosity issues - articles are too long and wordy](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Disjointed content - feels like "potpourri" instead of cohesive piece](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Time-consuming process - takes \~1 hour in Atlas vs 15 mins with Claude](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Over-emphasis on SEO at expense of readability/quality](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### Proposed Workflow Improvements

  - [Reduce number of steps from many to \~3 main stages](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Allow more freeform assignment input vs rigid SEO structure](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Implement agentic looping to refine drafts and meet quality metrics](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Improve internal linking, fact-checking, and image generation steps](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Surface prompts in studio for easier editing/iteration](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Balance SEO optimization with human readability](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Leverage analytics to provide authoritative content performance insights](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Build tools to help non-expert writers create quality content on diverse topics](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Focus on making the creative writing process more enjoyable and less tedious](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to prototype new streamlined article generation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Schedule prompt review session with Darrell, Matthew, and Daniel next week](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Surface prompts in studio UI for easier editing/iteration](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Review and update core prompts for outlining, brief generation, and article generation](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Continue work on content inventory and analytics projects to improve opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/-3U_JsX1_aveqyFQVq2y1oJpSVP3GfMY?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
